title: Broccoli salad
excerpt: Ingredients 900 g broccoli, broken into small pieces 1 x 250 g packet bacon bits, fried crispy 250 ml strong cheese (such as Emmental), cubed 200 ml sultanas 250 ml Ultimate Salad Dressing (see recipe) Method Blanch the broccoli in boiling water and plunge it immediately into ice water. html:
Ingredients

  • 900 g broccoli, broken into small pieces
  • 1 x 250 g packet bacon bits, fried crispy
  • 250 ml strong cheese (such as Emmental), cubed
  • 200 ml sultanas
  • 250 ml Ultimate Salad Dressing (see recipe)

Method

Blanch the broccoli in boiling water and plunge it immediately into ice water.

Mix the broccoli, bacon, cheese and sultanas and pour the salad dressing over. Mix and place in the fridge for at least an hour.

Serves 6 – 8 portions alongside any main course.

Easy!
